expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Manager",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to add a status column to the tasks table with a default of 'pending' so tasks have a state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/db/schema.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add shared type for task status",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to define a task status type (pending, in progress, done) to ensure type safety.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Define task status type/enum",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/types/task.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a user, I want the backend to support updating task statuses so UI changes persist.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint/action handles status updates",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/actions/task.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see the current status of a task as a badge on its card.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards render a status badge",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/TaskCard.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task's status directly from the task list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list rows have a control to change status",
        "Changing status saves immediately",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/TaskList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status to find specific work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list includes a filter dropdown for statuses",
        "Filtering updates the displayed tasks",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/TaskList.tsx",
        "src/hooks/useTasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.

expectations.text: Every story sets passes to false, notes to an empty string, and includes Typecheck passes.
